docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $775.00 FILED BY MELNICK, PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT GREEBER, PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S DECL:DEFT.NOT SRVD,REQUEST RESET TO EARLIER DTE ON 12/20/00 AT 10AM.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-20-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-05-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-20-2000 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-06-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-05-2001 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREEBER, PETER

PER PARTIES. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES NECESSARY 0N 8/31/01 AT 10AM COURT WILL CONTINUE CASE FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-31-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-01-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY AND THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 6 MONTHS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-01-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-20-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDANCE FORM DEFT W/COPY OF PAYMENT SCHEDULE AND CHECKS. INSUFFICIENT PROOF FOR DISMISSAL. DEFT NOTIFIED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEBER, PETER NON-APPEARANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GREEBER, PETER
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: RETURN NOT HERE, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
